name: agentsciencelab
installHints: Install permanent virtual applied-economics research team (AgentScienceLab / ASL) with 8 core roles, 14-specialist expert directory, and a research-tuned consultant team.
Default toolchain: Python + Stata + LaTeX. Requires git for worktree provisioning.
Depends on aiplus >= 0.7.6 for current ASL wrapper and refresh behavior, plus the three substrate modules listed in `requires.substrate_modules`.

Install replaces the default SWE consultant team (`.aiplus/consultant-team.toml`) with the research-tuned `consultant-team.agentsciencelab.toml` (5 expert seats + 3 personas + 5 owner gates, LIGHT tier skips consult).

Claude Code adapter (v0.2+): when `claude-code` is among the project's runtime adapters, install writes 22 subagents (8 core + 14 experts) to `.claude/agents/agentsciencelab-*.md`, 4 slash commands to `.claude/commands/asl-*.md`, and an ASL managed block in `CLAUDE.md` (separate markers from AiPlus's block).

OpenCode adapter (v0.3+): when `opencode` is among the project's runtime adapters, install writes the same 22 ASL subagents to `.opencode/agents/agentsciencelab-*.md` and 4 slash commands to `.opencode/commands/asl-*.md`.
Sibling to aiplus-agent-team; the two can be installed in the same project (consultant-team coexistence deferred to v0.3).

doctorChecks.description: ASL research-team configuration file is present.
PI agent config is present for worktree readiness.
ASL research-tuned consultant team config is present.
Codex routing mirror for v0.2.1 beta experts is present.
Claude Code subagent manifest is present (v0.2 adapter; 22 entries).
Claude Code CLAUDE.md managed-block body is present (v0.2 adapter).
OpenCode subagent manifest is present (v0.3 adapter; 22 entries).

notes: Private research data, restricted archives, and unpublished drafts MUST live outside any path managed by this module.
Private profiles may consume the econ team engine, but private profile content is not bundled.
Agent configurations must not contain secret values, API keys, credentials, IRB-protected data paths, or private archive paths.
AgentScienceLab (abbreviation: ASL) introduced as a sibling to aiplus-agent-team for applied-economics research workflows.
Core 8 roles mirror agent-team's tier structure but are renamed for academic research.
Brand-decoupled from AiPlus but functionally depends on the AiPlus substrate.
v0.2.0 ships the Claude Code adapter (`adapters/claude-code/`) so ASL agents auto-route in Claude Code sessions after install.
v0.3.0 ships the OpenCode adapter (`adapters/opencode/`) so ASL agents and slash commands install into OpenCode projects.
